theScene: You run around the caverns aimlessly, and can hear Amy drawing closer with a chirping giggle right before she lunges at you! You're barely ready to even try to stop her, leaving you helpless against her predatory leap.

You keep bolting down the caves as best you can, turning as often as possible, before pressing yourself against a wall, tossing a rock down another tunnel, seeing if Amy will fall for it.
